recommendations.title: Bunraku
recommendations.overview: In a world with no guns, a mysterious drifter, a bartender and a young samurai plot revenge against a ruthless leader and his army of thugs, headed by nine diverse and deadly assassins.

recommendations.title: Assassin Club
recommendations.overview: In this world of contract killers, Morgan Gaines is the best of the best. When Morgan is hired to kill six people around the world, he soon discovers all the targets are also assassins unknowingly hired to kill each other.

recommendations.title: Twin Sitters
recommendations.overview: An evil business executive is releasing dangerous toxins and the Barbarian Brothers set out to stop his evil work.

recommendations.title: Samurai I: Musashi Miyamoto
recommendations.overview: Struggling to elevate himself from his low caste in 17th century Japan, Miyamoto trains to become a mighty samurai warrior.

recommendations.title: The Last Samurai
recommendations.overview: Nathan Algren is an American hired to instruct the Japanese army in the ways of modern warfare, which finds him learning to respect the samurai and the honorable principles that rule them. Pressed to destroy the samurai's way of life in the name of m

recommendations.title: Andron
recommendations.overview: A group of people are plunged into a dark, claustrophobic maze, where they must fight to survive, as the outside world watches.

recommendations.title: RE:BORN
recommendations.overview: A former special forces operative struggling to contain the destructive impulses of his past goes on a rampage against a squad of ruthless assassins.

recommendations.title: Sanjuro
recommendations.overview: Toshiro Mifune swaggers and snarls to brilliant comic effect in Kurosawa's tightly paced, beautifully composed "Sanjuro." In this companion piece and sequel to "Yojimbo," jaded samurai Sanjuro helps an idealistic group of young warriors weed out thei

recommendations.title: Wonder Woman
recommendations.overview: An Amazon princess comes to the world of Man in the grips of the First World War to confront the forces of evil and bring an end to human conflict.

recommendations.title: Cat Run
recommendations.overview: When a sexy, high-end escort holds the key evidence to a scandalous government cover-up, two bumbling young detectives become her unlikely protectors from a ruthless assassin hired to silence her.
